intro: Over the past two weeks, ZCyberNews has published 23 articles under the threat-intelligence tag, covering activity from GopherWhisper, Handala Hack, and LockBit. The reporting spans April 13 to April 27, 2026, and documents impacts across government, technology, financial services, critical-infrastructure, and cybersecurity sectors. Affected regions include Global, Asia, Europe, Iran, and North America. The severity mix comprises nine informational, nine high, and three medium-rated pieces.
